news_items.headline: Blue Jays put Scherzer on IL with back spasms
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays placed three-time Cy Young winner Max Scherzer on the 10-day injured list Wednesday with back spasms.

news_items.headline: Guardians OF DeLauter (rib) goes on injured list
news_items.summary: Cleveland OF Chase DeLauter was placed on the 10-day injured list on Wednesday because of a fractured rib on his right side, the team announced.

news_items.headline: Boone talks Caballero's delay-of-game with MLB
news_items.summary: Yankees manager Aaron Boone said he's talked to MLB about Jose Caballero's deliberate approach to the plate that earned him a delay-of-game warning Sunday.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Verlander set for Comerica Park return Sun...
news_items.summary: Tigers right-hander Justin Verlander is expected to start against the White Sox on Sunday at Comerica Park, where he has not pitched for the franchise since 2017.

news_items.headline: Scoring change lands Rangers' Ahlstrom 1st MLB win...
news_items.summary: After a scoring change in the official box score, Texas Rangers rookie left-hander Robby Ahlstrom, 26, was awarded his first MLB victory on Tuesday, four days after he pitched in a victory over the Kansas City Royals.

news_items.headline: Cubs closer Palencia (elbow inflammation) to IL
news_items.summary: The Cubs put Daniel Palencia on the 15-day injured list because of right elbow inflammation Tuesday, one day after he struck out the side against the Rockies.

news_items.headline: Royals' Lugo (concussion) slated to return Friday
news_items.summary: Royals right-hander Seth Lugo threw a bullpen session Tuesday and is expected to start Friday after spending time on the concussion list.

news_items.headline: Game Discussion: Milwaukee Brewers (44-26) vs Cleveland Guardians (39-34)
news_items.summary: Brandon Sproat and Gavin Williams will duel in the second game of the series

news_items.headline: Minor League roundup, June 16: Another day, another Bo Davidson dinger
Shohei Ohtani allows season-high 4 earned runs and falls behind Jacob Misiorowski in ERA race, but Dodgers finish sweep of Rays
news_items.summary: The rough day raised Ohtani's ERA all the way up to, gasp, 1.47.

news_items.headline: Freddie Freeman’s go-ahead blast helps Dodgers complete sweep
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani allows a season-high four runs, but Freeman’s home run gave him a victory as Dodgers win 5-4.

news_items.headline: Ohtani's unusual start on mound ends with surprise pinch-hit opportunity
Chicago Cubs vs. Colorado Rockies preview, Wednesday 6/17, 7:05 CT
news_items.summary: The Cubs go for the series win.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani's ERA has doubled in last two starts as Rays bat around against him
news_items.summary: After he was virtually untouchable in his first nine appearances of the season, Shohei Ohtani, the pitcher, is mired in a mini funk on the mound.

news_items.headline: Giants players' Pride Night protest now involves backlash from all sides
news_items.summary: San Francisco Giants players added bible verses to their hats to protest Pride Night. Fans, MLB and politicians from both sides have responded.

news_items.headline: MLB Draft Combine invites are out. Which high schools saw the most players earn invites?
news_items.summary: Hundreds of prospects were invited to the 2026 MLB Draft Combine. See which high schools are sending the most.
